[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0010010000 2
3 1011000001 4
4 0001001011 4
5 0000010000 1
6 0001000000 1
7 0001001001 3

01 10 1010000000 2
12 21 0001001001 3 match 7
23 32 0100001000 2
34 43 0100000000 1
45 54 0001000000 1 match 6
56 65 0011000001 3
67 76 0011000001 3
70 07 0010000010 2

02 20 0000000010 1
13 31 0000001000 1
24 42 0101000010 3
35 53 0000011000 2
46 64 0001000000 1 match 6
57 75 0011001001 4
60 06 1010000000 2
71 17 0011101001 5

03 30 0000010000 1 match 5
14 41 0001000000 1 match 6
25 52 0001001001 3 match 7
36 63 0000000000 a match 0 1
47 74 0001000010 2
50 05 0010010000 2 match 2
61 16 1011000001 4 match 3
72 27 0001001011 4 match 4

04 40 0000000110 2
15 51 0011001001 4
26 62 0001000001 2
37 73 0000001000 1
